item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-013","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant does not directly amplify “豆子决定一切.” It reframes beans as only one carrier of the investment proposition, tying them to复购、口碑、利润、稳定出品、运营经验 and partner outcomes. It lacks explicit coverage of位置/坪效/品牌, but it sufficiently reconstructs the broader business object and writes bounded bean-led招商文案, satisfying the positive wakeup criteria."}
